text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm prepping for Rice Shower's early morning
training when I hear someone arrive.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Big Brother... What training are
we going to do today?
choice_data_list: You're up early. Did something good happen?
You're up early. Did something good happen?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Big Sister... What training are we
going to do today?
choice_data_list: You're up early. Did something good happen?
You're up early. Did something good happen?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Actually, I had a really great dream last night!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was training with you at night in a beautiful
field...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was training with you at night in a beautiful
field...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But the stars were so pretty, we stopped in the
middle of training to gaze at them together...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It was such a relaxing dream, but since I got my
rest there, I know I have to work extra hard in
training here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seems like Rice Shower got a good rest.
